resources.string: Add to the recommended apps list
Use of your personal data to show personalised ads
This app may include content that is not appropriate for all ages. Please, enter your birth year to continue.
"This app's details are not available to you because you are under the minimum age requirement. You can manage your preferences under Settings."
This information is stored on your device only and will not be shared.
Are you sure you want to reset your birth year? You will have to verify your age again.
Show an age verification prompt before accessing apps with age-restricted content.
Already have an account? SIGN IN
Google Analytics for Firebase provides free, unlimited reports on up to 500 different events. The SDK automatically captures certain key events and user properties for measurement.
Log in to see your custom feed
Why is this app published on Uptodown?
"Oops! We couldn't find any apps matching %s."
May affect how quickly apps are updated
Name format for the backup file:
"Oops! We couldn't find any categories matching %s."
The category %s has been added to your favorite lists
The category %s has been removed from your favorite lists
"I want to make a 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' request."

" "
When you visit this website, we collect personal information such as IP addresses, cookie identifiers and other pseudonymous identifiers. This information may be used to personalize content based on your interests, run and optimize advertising campaigns tailored to you, measure the performance of ads and content, and derive insights about the audiences who engage with ads and content. This information may also be disclosed by us to third parties on the IAB’s List of Downstream Participants that may further disclose it to other third parties."
"
Using personal information as described above is an integral part of how we operate our website, make revenue to support our staff, and generate relevant content for our audience. You can learn more about our data collection and use practices in our Privacy Policy."
"
If you wish to opt out of the disclosure of your personal information to third parties by us, please use the below opt out and confirm your selection. Please note that after your opt out request is processed, you may continue seeing interest-based ads based on personal Information utilized by us or personal information disclosed to third parties prior to your opt out. You may separately opt out of the further disclosure of your personal information by third parties on the IAB’s List of Downstream Participants." "
I want to request that you ‘Do Not Sell My Personal Information’
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
I have read and accepted the Uptodown.com terms of use.
If you cancel your pre-registration, you will not be notified when %s becomes available. Are you sure?
File %s already exists, please rename it
An error occurred while decompressing a file. Try again.
%s files will be deleted. This action can not be undone
The selected location is not the SD card root directory
Installation in progress. Please, wait for it to be done
In order to install this app, you must close %s by deleting it from the recent apps.
You already have this version installed on your device.
Firebase Crashlytics logs real-time bugs that help track, prioritize, and fix stability issues.
Controls how data is used on Wi-Fi and mobile data for downloads, updates and images.
Select the day your billing cycle renews each month.
Days 29 and 31 will be automatically adjusted in shorter months.
Apps available to download and install
To receive notifications, please enable them manually under app settings, thank you for your attention!
It is recommended that you keep the default selection
"You can safely uncheck the ones you don't need"
Choose the right density for your device (%s)
Do you want to cancel the current download?
Do you want to cancel the current downloads?
Are you sure you want to close the file manager?
Do you want to delete all downloads from the device?
Do you want to delete the %s file from the device?
Do you want to delete the selected downloads from the device?
Do you want to remove %s from the recommended apps list?
Do you want to remove %s from the wishlist?
"You aren't connected to Wi-Fi. Do you want to continue with this download?"

Disabled apps are those installed on your device that do not receive notifications nor updates. By default, the system automatically disables apps that have not been used for some time. They can be re-enabled by interacting with them.
Do you really want to stop the download? You will lose the data you have already downloaded.
Download is not available right now. Please, try again later or contact Uptodown Support.
Download not available in your location
Notify me when a download is complete
To post comments on Uptodown you need to verify your account. Please, check your associated email account, we just sent you a validation message.
Error. Did you enable storage write permissions?
"It wasn't possible to queue the download."
The download has not finished, please wait.
The email must be a valid email
Check your connection or try again later
"There isn't enough space on your disk."
Connection could not be established, service not found for %s
Your already submitted a review, but you can update it and re-send it, if required
Error: The file cannot be unzipped
You must accept the terms of use.
You must include an email address and password.
This feed has no content to display

Please also note that this website/app uses 1 or more Google services and may gather and store information including but not limited to your visit or usage behaviour. You may click to grant or deny consent to Google and its third-party tags to use your data for below specified purposes in below Google consent section.

"Uptodown compiles information on your device to offer you the latest app updates. You get customized Uptodown ads as well as advertising from our partners. You're in control of the way that Uptodown and our partners customize content and collect your information."
Device Analysis is deactivated, you did not grant Uptodown permission to analyze apps for an update. FIX IT:
Would you like to try downloading this app from our website Uptodown.com?
This badge means that the app is owned by one of the more than 75,000 developers who trust Uptodown to officially publish their products. That is:
Uptodown is an official distributor of the app.
For more information on how to become a dev onboard, please visit our [a]Help Center[/a].
The file you are downloading comes directly from the developer.
Your review of the app can be read (and possibly replied to) by the developer.
An error occurred while installing %s. It may not be supported by your device.
Do you want to install %s on your device?
Notify me when an app has been installed
Media controls hidden, press d-pad to show
Are you sure you want to log out?
Browse our huge catalog and be notified when new apps are released.
Download, install and update your favorite apps from our store.
Rate apps, post reviews and get help from our community.
Log in to follow this user
To be able to register you need to login
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Did you know that you can also install %s on your Android TV?
Did you know that you can back up your installed apps with %s?
Did you know that you can install apps in XAPK format with %s?
%s features a file manager so you can easily search for your local APKs.
"It looks like the app you're trying to download is not supported by your device"
Checking your device. This may take a few minutes.
%1$s wants to send you the following file: %2$s
Select the device you want to push the app to. Remember that this device must have the Apk Installer or Uptodown App Store application open in order to receive applications.
"Enable auto-install? You won't get install notifications."
Uptodown App Store will automatically close to apply the update. You will have to open the app again to be able to use it.
%1$s needs permission for installing apps. Please check the box called: \"Allow apps from this source\"
You have not yet added any application to the list
"Storage permission denied. Can't download any apps."
We need permission to show your rollbackable apps
Storage read/write permissions will be requested because I need it to be able to download apps.
It is not possible to install a version older than the application installed.
"Don't have an account yet? SIGN UP"
The storage permission is required to use Uptodown
"The architecture of your device does not seem to be compatible with the app you're about to download, do you want to proceed with the download?"
"The screen density of your device may not be supported by the app you're about to download, do you want to proceed with the download?"
"It seems the app requires some features that your device doesn't support. Do you still want to continue downloading?"
"It seems the app requires some features that your device doesn't support. Do you still want to install it?"
"The sdk on your device seems to be incompatible with the app you're about to download, do you want to proceed with the download?"
In order to install an earlier version you have to uninstall your current version so you might lose some data from that app.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Your profile has no reviews yet
Data collected from Uptodown App Store
There is a new update available
There are no replies to this comment yet
Not enough space left to download this file.
No apps with security issues were found.
%1$s has detected that the %2$s app may contain viruses.
%1$s has detected that %2$s apps may contain viruses.
"Enable notifications and don't miss any app updates!"
You have a pending installation that was initiated on your %1$s device: %2$s
%1$s is now available to download and install from %2$s
Your privacy choices have been saved. If you clear your app data, your preference will be forgotten.
Consent to the use of this technology and the processing of your personal data for the purposes below. You can change your mind at any time.
This file may contain a virus or other malware
Installing this app may put your device at risk. Uptodown has detected security threats. [xx]See report[/xx]
Pre-registered successfully! We will notify you when %s is available
Install as root or system app
Search for files in storage unit
Terms of use and privacy policy
A newer version of %s is available
"Notify me about updates for apps and games I've downloaded"
Log in to add apps to your recommended apps list
Enjoy the full Uptodown App Store experience! Join our community today for [xx]exclusive features[/xx] and [xx]updates[/xx]. Click here to start.
Remove ads and more with Turbo
Remove from the recommended apps list
Restart the app for the changes to take effect
%1$s has been added to the queue, which is currently paused. Please, resume it to proceed.
This comment has already been liked
Sent! Your message should show up soon…
Article 17 of the GDPR emphasizes the right to elimination. Send us an e-mail and we will delete all of your data stored on Uptodown.
Sorry, we are unable to display previous versions of %s at the moment.
Select the application you wish to rollback. Then, choose the desired version from the available options for download and install.
If you want to browse your SD Card you must grant access.
Show installation details when installing an XAPK
Show a warning when trying to install an already existing version.
Signup error. Please, try again later.
Your suggestion has been sent. Thanks!
Write here the reason why you need to contact us
You will not be able to download applications or updates if you do not activate the device analysis.
Uptodown collects information about the applications installed on your device and its specifications, in order to provide the latest updates compatible with your device.
Redeem discount code for Turbo users
Join our [xx]premium subscription[/xx] service, enjoy exclusive features and support the project.
Change your avatar with unique designs for subscribers and modify your user profile look and feel.

Thanks for supporting us! From this moment on, and as long as you have an active subscription, you will have access to exclusive features. You can check your account status in the user menu, under %s.
Your reviews will now reach more people by being featured over standard profiles.
Now you can browse Uptodown without any ads, making the experience much faster and smoother.
The download of %1$s has been completed, you can find it in the \"Downloads\" section
Are you sure you want to unlink this device from your account?
Notify me every time an update is available
Notify me daily about update availability
Never notify me about update availability
Notify me weekly about update availability
How to handle available app updates
This is an AI-generated summary based upon real user reviews.
Some styles are locked. Upgrade to <turbo>Uptodown Turbo</turbo>
Must be less than 100 characters long
Must be at least 6 characters long
Must be at least 3 characters long
%1$s has no update file downloaded yet.
of %1$s antivirus say(s) may contain adware

The security report will be available soon. However, this app has already been reviewed by our team. For more information about our privacy policies", please refer to the section [a]Is Uptodown safe?[/a]
The app's technical data is available in Uptodown, so you can check the packagename in the datasheet that accompanies the download, as well as the signature that verifies the file's origin:"
The app will close now. Please, restart it to continue.
Log in to add apps to your wishlist
The %s download is about to start
Continue with Uptodown App Store setup
The user-friendly way to get apps
